item.verity.verity_disc.desc: The signature song that Verity™ loves.
verity.config.title: Verity Configuration
verity.configuration.aiProvider.tooltip: Choose the AI provider to use for Verity's brain.
verity.configuration.apiKey.tooltip: Your Groq API key. Required for Verity's AI brain to function.
verity.configuration.canCrash.tooltip: Allow Verity to kick you from the server when killed by the demon.
verity.configuration.clearPeacefulMobs.t: Remove peaceful mobs (Villager, Cow, Sheep, Pig, Chicken) when turning hostile.
verity.configuration.color.tooltip: Hue of Verity's texture color (0–360 degrees).
verity.configuration.customName.tooltip: Custom name for Verity. Leave empty for default 'Verity'.
verity.configuration.dayCount.tooltip: Number of in-game days before Verity turns hostile/demon.
verity.configuration.immersiveMode.toolt: Hide all Verity UI elements (and chat if server has it enabled).
verity.configuration.killVillagers.toolt: Toggles if Verity should attack and kill villagers.
verity.configuration.ollamaAiModel.toolt: The AI model name used via Ollama.
verity.configuration.ollamaSttModel.tool: The STT model used by Whisper.
verity.configuration.ollamaSttUrl.toolti: The URL of the Whisper STT server.
verity.configuration.ollamaTtsModel.tool: The TTS model used by Kokoro.
verity.configuration.ollamaTtsUrl.toolti: The URL of the FastKokoro TTS server.
verity.configuration.ollamaTtsVoice.tool: The voice ID that Kokoro uses for synthesis.
verity.configuration.ollamaUrl.tooltip: The URL of the LiteLLM / Ollama server.
verity.configuration.playVideo.tooltip: Play the Verity intro cinematic on client startup.
verity.configuration.requireVerity.toolt: Require the word "Verity" in every sentence to speak to him.
verity.configuration.showKarma.tooltip: Toggles the Karma bar display above your hotbar.
verity.configuration.thinkingMode.toolti: Enable chain-of-thought for smarter responses (Qwen3 models only).
verity.configuration.trueDarkness.toolti: Toggle extreme darkness mode for horror atmosphere.
verity.configuration.useKokoro.tooltip: Always use Kokoro TTS instead of other providers.
verity.configuration.useLocalStt.tooltip: Use offline speech-to-text instead of cloud provider.
verity.configuration.useLocalTts.tooltip: Use offline Kitten AI voice instead of Groq cloud TTS.
verity.configuration.useLocalWhisper.too: Use local Whisper STT instead of cloud provider.
verity.configuration.useNativeTts.toolti: Use the OS built-in narrator instead of cloud TTS.
verity.configuration.useOllama.tooltip: Always use local Ollama instead of a cloud AI provider.
verity.configuration.voice.tooltip: Choose the voice that Verity uses for TTS.
